title: Chana Salad (Chickpea Protein Salad)

ingredients.name: dried chickpeas, soaked overnight OR 1 can drained chickpeas

subs.name: boiled rajma (kidney beans) or lobia — same dressing works equally well
raw mango (kachchi kairi), grated — gives the same tartness with a fruity edge
1/2 tsp cumin powder + pinch of amchur if chaat masala is unavailable

steps.text: If using dried chickpeas soaked overnight, drain and pressure cook with fresh water and a pinch of salt for 4-5 whistles on medium heat until fully tender but not mushy. Drain and let them cool to room temperature. If using canned chickpeas, simply drain and rinse well.

While the chickpeas cool, dice the cucumber and tomato into 1 cm cubes, finely chop the onion and mince the green chilli. Keeping the pieces uniform means every mouthful gets a balanced mix of textures.
Combine the cooled chickpeas, cucumber, tomato and onion in a large bowl. Add green chilli if using.
Squeeze lemon juice over the salad, sprinkle chaat masala, red chilli powder and salt. Toss everything together firmly so the chickpeas absorb the seasoning — taste and adjust lemon or salt.

Finish with coriander and mint leaves. Serve immediately for maximum freshness, or refrigerate up to 6 hours — the chickpeas continue to absorb the dressing and taste even better after 30 minutes of resting.

cross_contact_notes: Ingredient metadata cannot prove an allergen-free kitchen. Check packaged labels and cross-contact statements for your products.
safety_warnings: Follow the cooker manufacturer's fill, venting and opening instructions; never force the lid open under pressure.
trust.provenance_summary: AI-assisted original draft; declared licence original.
trust.substitution_warning: A substitution can introduce allergens or change dietary suitability. Never claim a swap is safe without checking the replacement's label and the user's allergy context.

substitution_notes: chickpea → boiled rajma (kidney beans) or lobia — same dressing works equally well; curry-powder → 1/2 tsp cumin powder + pinch of amchur if chaat masala is unavailable; lemon → raw mango (kachchi kairi), grated — gives the same tartness with a fruity edge
